text: Standing outside this glass partition, I feel both curious and a bit disconnected, as if I am on the threshold of understanding yet not quite invited in. The sterile, modern environment accentuates a sense of formality. The presence of safety equipment and rules remind me of the boundaries and structures that organize public spaces. My mind drifts to thoughts about the distance between observer and observed, and whether transparency—so literally embodied by this glass—truly offers connection or just another layer of separation.
